home.tagline: Wireless audio for tours, conferences and live events.
home.guideHelper: Start a session and broadcast your voice to your group.
home.guestHelper: Join a session using the PIN from your guide.

activateLicense.title: License
activateLicense.subtitle: Enter your Voice Guide AirLink license code to unlock guide mode and start your tours.
activateLicense.capacityHelper: This is the maximum number of guests allowed for this license.
activateLicense.errorGeneric: Unable to activate license at the moment.
activateLicense.helper: After activation, this license will be ready to start a live audio session as a guide. You will then receive a PIN to share with your guests.

guestJoin.title: Enter Tour PIN
guestJoin.subtitle: Type the PIN code you received from your guide to join the tour.
guestJoin.errorGeneric: Unable to join the tour. Please check the PIN and try again.
guestJoin.helper: Don't have a PIN? Ask your tour guide.

guideDashboard.title: Guide Dashboard
guideDashboard.subtitle: Check your license and start a new tour.
guideDashboard.cardHelper: This is the maximum number of guests allowed for your current license.
guideDashboard.errorMissingLicense: Missing active license. Please activate your license again from the home screen.
guideDashboard.errorGeneric: Unable to start a new tour at the moment.
guideDashboard.sessionHelper: Share this PIN with your guests so they can join the tour.

guideTour.title: Live Tour
guideTour.subtitle: Start real-time audio for your group.
guideTour.pinHelper: Share this PIN with your guests.
guideTour.endedBody: Your tour session has expired or was closed.

guestTour.title: Guest Tour
guestTour.subtitle: Listen to your guide in real time.
guestTour.connectedHelper: You are connected to this tour. Keep this screen open while listening.
guestTour.timeRemainingHelper: When time runs out, the tour will end automatically.
guestTour.confirmLeaveBody: You will stop listening and exit the session.
guestTour.endedBody: This tour session has expired or was closed by the guide.

permissions.micMessage: VoiceGuide AirLink needs access to the microphone to start the background audio service.
permissions.requiredMessage: Without microphone permission the service cannot be started.
permissions.missingChannelGuide: Missing audio channel (PIN) for guide broadcast.
permissions.missingChannelGuest: Missing audio channel (PIN) for guest listening.
